title: EllipticalArc3D Object
description: Transient 3D elliptical arc. A transient elliptical arc is not displayed or saved in a document. Transient 3D elliptical arcs are used as a wrapper to work with raw 3D elliptical arc information. They are created statically using the create method of the EllipticalArc3D class.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Creates and returns a copy of this EllipticalArc3D object.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Gets all of the data defining the elliptical arc.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets all of the data defining the elliptical arc.

properties.name: asNurbsCurve
properties.description: Returns a NURBS curve that is geometrically identical to the elliptical arc.

properties.name: center
properties.description: Gets and sets the center point of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: curveType
properties.description: Returns the type of geometry this curve represents.

properties.name: endAngle
properties.description: Gets and sets the end angle of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: evaluator
properties.description: Returns an evaluator object that lets you perform additional evaluations on the curve.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: majorAxis
properties.description: Gets and sets the major axis of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: majorRadius
properties.description: Gets and sets the major radius of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: minorRadius
properties.description: Gets and sets the minor radius of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: normal
properties.description: Gets the normal of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: startAngle
properties.description: Gets and sets the start angle of the elliptical arc.

classType.title: EllipticalArc3D.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

copy.title: EllipticalArc3D.copy Method
copy.description: Creates and returns a copy of this EllipticalArc3D object.
copy.return_description: Returns a new EllipticalArc3D object that is a copy of this Arc3D object.

create.title: EllipticalArc3D.create Method

syntax.python: returnValue = adsk.core.EllipticalArc3D.create(center, normal, majorAxis, majorRadius, minorRadius, startAngle, endAngle)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = adsk::core::EllipticalArc3D::create(center, normal, majorAxis, majorRadius, minorRadius, startAngle, endAngle);

create.return_description: Returns the newly created elliptical arc or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: The center point of the elliptical arc.

parameters.name: normal
parameters.description: The normal vector of the elliptical arc.

parameters.name: majorAxis
parameters.description: The major axis of the elliptical arc.

parameters.name: majorRadius
parameters.description: The major radius of the of the elliptical arc.

parameters.name: minorRadius
parameters.description: The minor radius of the of the elliptical arc.

parameters.name: startAngle
parameters.description: The start angle of the elliptical arc in radians, where 0 is along the major axis.

parameters.name: endAngle
parameters.description: The end angle of the elliptical arc in radians, where 0 is along the major axis.
